title: duguetia amplexifolia
intro: Duguetia amplexifolia, also known as the Panama tree or Guanacaste, is a flowering plant species in the family Annonaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or tincture, and it is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to create herbal remedies for various ailments.
